# Representative polyenergetic 6 MV photon pencil beam in water for a more
# clinically realistic SFRT surrogate baseline, with Monte Carlo stochasticity
# output from the scorer stage.
#
# Generated by scripts/run_phase12_mc_coupled_plan.py

s:Ts/G4DataDirectory = "__G4_DATA_DIR__"

s:Ph/Default/Type = "Geant4_Modular"
sv:Ph/Default/Modules = __PHYSICS_MODULES__
d:Ph/Default/CutForGamma = __CUT_GAMMA_MM__ mm
d:Ph/Default/CutForElectron = __CUT_ELECTRON_MM__ mm
d:Ph/Default/CutForPositron = __CUT_POSITRON_MM__ mm

s:Ge/World/Material  = "G4_AIR"
d:Ge/World/HLX       = __WORLD_HLX_CM__ cm
d:Ge/World/HLY       = __WORLD_HLY_CM__ cm
d:Ge/World/HLZ       = __WORLD_HLZ_CM__ cm
b:Ge/World/Invisible = "True"

s:Ge/BeamOrigin/Type   = "Group"
s:Ge/BeamOrigin/Parent = "World"
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/TransX = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/TransY = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/TransZ = __SOURCE_Z_CM__ cm
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/RotX   = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/RotY   = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/RotZ   = 0.0 deg

d:Ge/Phantom/TransX      = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/Phantom/TransY      = 0.0 cm

d:Ge/Phantom/RotY        = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/Phantom/RotZ        = 0.0 deg

i:Ge/Phantom/XBins       = __XBINS__
i:Ge/Phantom/YBins       = __YBINS__
i:Ge/Phantom/ZBins       = __ZBINS__

s:Sc/Dose3D/Quantity                  = "DoseToWater"
s:Sc/Dose3D/Component                 = "Phantom"
sv:Sc/Dose3D/Report                   = 2 "Sum" "Standard_Deviation"
s:Sc/Dose3D/OutputType                = "CSV"
s:Sc/Dose3D/OutputFile                = "__OUTPUT_STEM__"
s:Sc/Dose3D/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
b:Sc/Dose3D/OutputToConsole           = "False"

s:So/MySource/Type                     = "Beam"
s:So/MySource/Component                = "BeamOrigin"
s:So/MySource/BeamParticle             = "gamma"

dv:So/MySource/BeamEnergySpectrumValues = __SPECTRUM_COUNT__ __SPECTRUM_VALUES__ MeV
uv:So/MySource/BeamEnergySpectrumWeights = __SPECTRUM_COUNT__ __SPECTRUM_WEIGHTS__
